---
title: "Jiayi Liu"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: google
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com
---

Hi! I am a Ph.D. student in Economics at Brown University.

My primary research interest is applied microeconomics, with a focus on topics in violence, healthcare, and media. My research is very topic-driven.

Please feel free to get in touch!
